rationale: PR delivers the Newsroom/Columnist platform. convex/adminAuth.ts adds requireBulletinEditor(ctx) that returns BulletinEditorContext for Administrator OR Columnist roles (instead of requireAdministrator). convex/bulletins.ts updates the category union to include `crypto`, `broadcast`, `community` literals alongside the originals, and adds imageStorageId: v.optional(v.id('_storage')) plus authorId fields to the create/update arg validators; all mutations (create, update, remove, flyer ops) switch from requireAdministrator to requireBulletinEditor; remove() and removeImage() delete from ctx.storage when imageStorageId is set. convex/schema.ts adds by_category and by_author indexes. convex/seed.ts implements seedAll as an internal mutation populating 4 roles, 5 zones, 7 departments, 32 members with Hebrew names, 120 donations across 12 months, and 12 bulletins across all 7 categories; idempotency is enforced by 'skip if existing' checks on email/name and an early-out when bulletins>5 and donations>20 as the body says. src/components/auth/AdminGuard.tsx widens admin route access to Columnist role. AdminDashboard.tsx conditionally renders tabs (Columnists see only Newsroom). BulletinsTab.tsx adds drag-and-drop image upload with 5MB client-side validation, category filter bar with counts, card-grid layout with image previews, author display, remove-image action, and the full 7-category dropdown. BulletinPage.tsx is the magazine-style newsstand with category filter tabs. OverviewStatsCards.tsx adds the 4-column layout with Users/Wallet/Calendar/TrendingUp icons. Matches the body comprehensively.
